items.title: Sam Altman's Project World Expands Human Verification to Tinder
items.summary: Sam Altman's Project World is reportedly scaling its human verification services, with Tinder being the latest platform to integrate its technology.

items.title: Cursor Reportedly Seeks $2B+ Funding at $50B Valuation as Enterprise AI Surges
items.summary: Sources indicate that Cursor is in talks to raise over $2 billion at a staggering $50 billion valuation, driven by rapid growth in its enterprise AI solutions.

items.title: Key Executives Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles Depart OpenAI Amid 'Side Quest' Streamlining
items.summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles have exited OpenAI, signaling the company's continued effort to streamline operations and shed non-core projects.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Initiative to Accelerate Cyber Defense Ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI has announced a new initiative focused on accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem, aiming to enhance protection against digital threats.

items.title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for 3D Reconstruction, Generation, and Simulation
items.summary: Researchers introduce HY-World 2.0, an advanced multi-modal world model capable of reconstructing, generating, and simulating complex 3D environments.

items.title: Google Introduces New AI-Powered Travel Features for Smarter Summer Planning
items.summary: Google is rolling out seven new AI-powered features to help users plan and experience smarter summer travel, leveraging advancements in Google Search and AI.

items.title: Gemini App Gains New Personalized Image Creation Capabilities
items.summary: The Gemini app now offers enhanced ways for users to create personalized images, further expanding its creative AI functionalities.

items.title: RAD-2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning with a Generator-Discriminator Framework
items.summary: RAD-2 presents a novel generator-discriminator framework designed to significantly scale reinforcement learning, offering new avenues for complex AI training.

items.title: GlobalSplat: Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting via Global Scene Tokens
items.summary: GlobalSplat introduces an efficient feed-forward method for 3D Gaussian Splatting, utilizing global scene tokens to enhance performance in 3D rendering and reconstruction.

items.title: NuHF Claw: A Risk-Constrained Cognitive Agent for Nuclear Control Rooms
items.summary: NuHF Claw introduces a risk-constrained cognitive agent framework designed to provide human-centered procedure support in digital nuclear control rooms, enhancing safety and efficiency.

items.title: RadAgent: A Tool-Using AI Agent for Stepwise Interpretation of Chest CT Scans
items.summary: RadAgent is presented as a tool-using AI agent capable of providing stepwise interpretations of chest computed tomography scans, potentially aiding medical diagnostics.

items.title: OpenAI Releases Guide for Creating Images with ChatGPT
items.summary: OpenAI has published an academy guide detailing how users can effectively create images using ChatGPT, making the feature more accessible.

items.title: OpenAI Academy Offers Guidance on Using ChatGPT for Research
items.summary: A new resource from OpenAI Academy provides insights and best practices for leveraging ChatGPT as a tool in academic and professional research.

items.title: Memory Transfer Learning: Understanding Memory Transfer Across Domains in Coding Agents
items.summary: This paper investigates the mechanisms of memory transfer learning, exploring how memories are effectively transferred across different domains in AI coding agents.

items.title: Simulating Human Cognition with Heartbeat-Driven Autonomous Thinking for LLM-based AI
items.summary: A new framework proposes simulating human cognition through heartbeat-driven autonomous thinking activity scheduling for large language model-based AI systems.
